chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1085 of 2022 CP D 1183 of 2022 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of Misc. No.4908/2022 2. For hearing of main case 24.01.2025 Mr. Mamoon N. Chaudhry, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Ghulam Asghar Pathan, advocate for respondent Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General Learned counsel for the petitioners submits that these petitions assail show cause notices, however, the petitioners would not press these petitions and respond to the show cause notice/s before the issuing authority. It is further sought that the notice be adjudicated vide a speaking order, after providing opportunity to petitioners to be heard, and pending adjudication no further coercive action be taken against the petitioners. Learned counsel for respondents / department has no cavil in such regard and states that the petitions be disposed off in the said terms. Order accordingly. Office is instructed to place copy of this order in connected matter. Judge Judge Amjad
